# Brunner Test - 3 Prongs for Student Loan Discharge [2026] - Brunnertest
> The Brunner test determines if student loans are dischargeable in bankruptcy. Learn the 3-prong analysis, recent cases, and how to pass. 202...

## About
brunnertest.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Adversary Proceeding Process - How to File for Discharge - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/adversary-proceeding.html
- Alternatives to the Brunner Test - Other Paths to Relief - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/brunner-alternatives.html
- Brunner Test 3 Prongs - Student Loan Discharge Calculator [2026] - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/brunner-test-3-prongs.html
- DOJ 2022 Guidance - What Changed for Student Loan Discharge - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/doj-guidance-2023.html
- Good Faith Requirement - What Courts Really Look For - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/good-faith-requirement.html
- Brunner Test - 3 Prongs for Student Loan Discharge [2026] - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/
- Partial Student Loan Discharge - Reducing What You Owe - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/partial-discharge.html
- Persistent Effort - Building Your Case Over Time - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/persistent-effort.html
- Recent Student Loan Discharge Cases - What Courts Are Deciding - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/recent-case-outcomes.html
- Student Loan Bankruptcy Terms You Need to Know - 25+ Definitions - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/student-loan-terms.html
- The Three Prongs of the Brunner Test - Explained in Detail - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/three-prong-test.html
- Totality of Circumstances Test - The Brunner Alternative - Brunnertest: https://brunnertest.org/totality-of-circumstances.html
- Privacy Policy: https://brunnertest.org/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
